scope: Enemy terrain alert response role carryover
After Action role and commendation display
Army Camp unit-history tactical lesson from terrain enemy response
flow: Cleared browser storage through CDP and reloaded the reverse-slope tactical profile.
Started 1x battle tick, waited for enemy spawn, stopped the battle.
Verified visible alert: enemy terrain maneuver / reverse-slope ridge-hiding mob.
Clicked the alert recommendation: battle line blocking response.
Withdrew, opened After Action, and applied the result back to Army Camp.
Selected the responding brigade in Army Camp and verified unit history and tactical lesson carryover.

observed.battleAlert: 敵地形機動: 稜線裏滞留
observed.armyCampLesson: 戦術教訓 地形敵対応1件 / 伝令評価1件 / 得意弾性拒止 / 即応+3 / 統制+1 / 後退判断+2
observed.armyCampHistory: 東方辺境防衛線防衛戦 - 逆斜面射線検証: 戦闘撤退、地形敵封鎖、永久損耗0、収容0、経験+4、装備摩耗-0.01、地形機動敵を封鎖・稜線裏敵群を指名
